title: Visual Shaders
description: Cinematic lighting shader with stunning sunsets, volumetric fog, realistic water, and atmospheric effects for beautiful Minecraft visuals.
body:
**🌅 Atmospheric Lighting & Realistic Graphics**
Transform your Minecraft experience with cinematic atmosphere and realistic lighting that brings your world to life.

**✨ Key Features:**
Dynamic Sky & Lighting

Breathtaking sunrises and sunsets with gradient transitions from warm oranges to cool blues
Realistic day-night cycle with smooth lighting transitions
Starry night sky with twinkling stars

**Enhanced Atmosphere**

Volumetric fog and distance haze creating depth and realism
Atmospheric light scattering for natural-looking horizons
Soft shadows and ambient occlusion for detailed builds

**Water Effects**

Realistic water transparency with underwater visibility
Enhanced reflections on water surfaces
Volumetric lighting underwater with caustics

**Performance**

Balanced performance for comfortable gameplay
Customizable quality settings
Compatible with various modpacks and builds

**📸 Perfect for:**

Screenshots and cinematics
Building showcases
Atmospheric survival gameplay
Content creation

**🎮 Technical Details:**

Supports latest Minecraft versions
Works with Iris/Optifine
Configurable settings for different hardware
